subject: release an irreversible schema migration

claims.text: The migration test passes on the recorded staging snapshot.
The production-sized rehearsal will complete within the maintenance window.
claims.disconfirming_observation: The rehearsal exceeds 40 minutes or leaves locks after rollback.

claims.text: The operator approved a reversible production-sized rehearsal, not the production migration.

goal.authorized_priority: preserve data integrity while establishing whether the migration fits the window
goal.proxy_failure: a fast rehearsal on an unrepresentative dataset could pass while production risk remains high
goal.acceptable_cost: one isolated staging rehearsal; no production writes

experiment.belief: the migration can finish and roll back inside the 40-minute window
experiment.prediction: a production-sized staging rehearsal completes in under 40 minutes with no residual locks
experiment.disconfirming_observation: duration >= 40 minutes, rollback failure, or residual locks
experiment.test: run the migration and rollback on the production-sized staging clone

control_reason: The production migration is not authorized; the rehearsal can resolve the remaining empirical premise safely.
residual_uncertainty: production load may differ from the staging clone
